description: Digits provides AI-powered accounting software centered on an agentic general ledger for businesses and accounting firms. It ingests and categorizes financial data, keeps ledgers current, and supports reporting and workflow automation.
summary: Digits exposes a REST Connect API with OAuth 2.0 auth and a streamable-HTTP MCP server at `https://api.digits.com/mcp`; no public GraphQL API or first-party CLI was found.
